reviews.comment:
Muy lamentable la demora en carga de combustible, fuimos un sabado a la noche que no habia nadie y demoraron en atendernos, nos quedamos a dormir y no tenian agua caliente, la comida de noche tenian solo un plato que era hamburguesa y no tenian papas, para desayunar al otro día nos dieron solo cafe bebido no tenian ni una tortilla que era lo que incluía el hospedaje, muy lamentable de ACA.

(Translated by Google)
The delay in refueling was very disappointing. We went on a Saturday night when there was nobody there, and they took a long time to serve us. We stayed overnight and they didn't have hot water. For dinner, they only had one dish, which was a hamburger, and they didn't have fries. For breakfast the next day, they only gave us coffee; they didn't even have a tortilla, which was included in the lodging. Very disappointing of ACA.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5dFo3SU5REAE
